description: Framagit is Framasoft’s hosted GitLab Community Edition instance for source code hosting and collaborative software development. It provides Git repositories, project management, and related GitLab features on the `framagit.org` domain.
summary: Framagit exposes a GitLab-compatible REST API at `/api/v4`, a GraphQL API at `/api/graphql`, and two OAuth-protected MCP endpoints at `/api/v4/mcp` and `/api/v4/orbit/mcp`; authentication is via OAuth applications/tokens or personal access tokens depending on surface.
